findings.message: plugin.json declares version 1.2.0 but mcp-server/package.json is at 1.3.1; marketplace listings will show an outdated version while users receive newer code via the @latest npx install

npx -y claude-video-vision@latest auto-installs the unversioned @latest npm tag on every MCP server startup; a supply-chain compromise of the package or a breaking update is immediately trusted and executed
Agent has no example blocks; readers and the framework cannot verify expected input/output behavior
Vague quantifier: 'concise but detailed' provides no objective measure for description length or depth
Vague quantifier: 'key objects' — no criteria given for which objects qualify as key vs. incidental
Command frontmatter is missing the required `name` field; without it the command cannot register in the plugin's slash-command list
Command body calls video_configure, video_setup, and video_watch but the frontmatter declares no allowed-tools; tool calls may be blocked in restricted permission modes
Vague quantifier: 'a brief summary of the results' — no scope, length, or content criteria defined
Vague quantifier: 'keep it concise' — unenforceable without a concrete length or detail target
Command frontmatter is missing the required `name` field; without it the command cannot register in the plugin's slash-command list
Command body calls video_info, video_analyze, video_watch, video_detail, and video_setup but the frontmatter declares no allowed-tools
Command requires a video path but provides no instruction for what to do when the user invokes it with no arguments
Vague quantifier: 'plan smart frame extraction' — 'smart' is undefined and gives the model no actionable criteria
Vague quantifier: 'give a comprehensive summary' — no coverage criteria or length guidance
Production dependencies @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, zod, @google/genai, and openai all use ^ semver ranges, permitting unreviewed minor and patch updates
Vague quantifier: 'make smart extraction decisions' — undefined standard for decision quality
Vague quantifier: 'Select filters relevant to the user's question' — relevance is implicit; the lookup table below partially resolves this but the prose itself is vague
Vague quantifier: 'if the initial view is insufficient' — no threshold or failure criteria defined
Vague quantifier: 'form a complete understanding' — completeness cannot be verified or enforced

Vague quantifier: 'a brief summary of the results' — no scope, length, or content criteria defined
Vague quantifier: 'keep it concise' — unenforceable without a concrete length or detail target
